description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a thick, matte black bezel. The screen is supported by a geometric, polygonal stand that appears sturdy and stable, with a broad base and a single, angled support arm connecting to the rear of the monitor. The front of the monitor features a vibrant display, while the back is plain and unadorned, with no visible ports or buttons. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile and the angular design of the stand. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with a matte finish, likely reinforced with some internal metal components for stability. There are no visible logos, buttons, or decorative elements on the exterior.
description: A flat-panel computer monitor with a thick black bezel and a polygonal, angular stand, finished in matte black plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen framed by a thick black bezel and the polygonal stand base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the monitor and the angled support arm of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the full shape of the stand's base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the monitor's thinness and the angular connection between the stand and the screen.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, flat, and matte black with sharp corners and no visible texture or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a polygonal pedestal type with a broad, angular base and a single angled support arm, all in matte black plastic.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
